content.text:
[[reply_to_current]] Hi Ken — Eon here. 🎯

I'm online and ready. Quick notes:
- In group: mention me (or use a command) when you want me to act — I try to stay quiet unless asked.
- Common commands: /help (overview), /start (this), /remember (save a note) — ask if you want specific actions (search, files, reminders, code help).
- If you prefer a private conversation, DM me.

What would you like me to do now?
